edge-cases.pwn.message: "GetPlayerCameraTargetVehicle" returns a value invalidated by "INVALID_VEHICLE_ID", not "INVALID_ACTOR_ID"

invalid.pwn.message: "GetPlayerVehicleID" returns a value invalidated by "INVALID_VEHICLE_ID", not "INVALID_PLAYER_ID"
"CreateActor" returns a value invalidated by "INVALID_ACTOR_ID", not "INVALID_OBJECT_ID"
